title: melica × thuringiaca
intro: Melica × thuringiaca, also known as Melica-rye grass or False Melic, is a hybrid grass species derived from the cross between Melica nutans and a species of rye grass. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional European herbal medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Melica × thuringiaca include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. Herbal preparations of Melica × thuringiaca typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or used as topical treatments.
